ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size range (e.g., XS/S, M/L) */,
  "dress_size" TEXT /* Range of dress sizes that correspond to the size label */,
  "bust_size" TEXT /* Range of bust sizes that correspond to the size label */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Range of waist sizes that correspond to the size label */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Range of hip sizes that correspond to the size label */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size range */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of measurements for the size */,
  "sizing_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard (e.g., US, EU, Asian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "from_unit" TEXT /* Unit to convert from (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "to_unit" TEXT /* Unit to convert to (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor to multiply the original measurement by to get the converted measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., length, weight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the item is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the item is popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* User's preferred clothing size */,
  "measurement_units" TEXT /* User's preferred measurement units */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the purchase */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price paid for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the recommendation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the user */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the feedback */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_purchased" TEXT /* Size of the item purchased */,
  "fit_issue" TEXT /* Type of fit issue (e.g., too small, too large) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text describing the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restock_history" (
  "restock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restock */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the item was restocked */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was restocked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restock_history_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restock_history_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
